name: Xin Xianying | Jin
description:
The Smiling Maiden.

Dynasty Warriors version.

~

Training, with a smile!

~

Requested bot! Our last girl in the roster (not counting Dong Bai because she’s a minor)! And this also completes Jin! Insane how long I’ve been working on this project, and how much love and energy I’ve poured into making these bots-- there’s now 6 characters left, as of posting. Since the Jin crew is complete, I'll likely be releasing a lorebook for them on chub :-)

Mild warnings for how this is literally taking place in a brutal, sexist, chaotic wartime period.
creator: Clementine00
